title: mcp-defense-bench: A Layer-Aware, Framework-Mapped Benchmark for Model Context Protocol Security Proxies
description:
A vendor-neutral benchmark that measures how much of the Model Context Protocol (MCP) attack surface a defensive proxy or gateway actually covers, driving each tool through its real code. It contributes: (1) a threat–control crosswalk of 22 MCP attack vectors mapped to architectural layer, STRIDE, the NIST AI Risk Management Framework, and the OWASP Top 10 for LLM and Agentic Applications; (2) a matched malicious/benign test corpus; (3) adapters, a runner, and a scorer; and (4) an accompanying whitepaper. This deposit includes the rubric, corpus, adapters, harness, and the whitepaper (Markdown, LaTeX, and PDF).

Rubric data and the whitepaper are licensed CC-BY-4.0; the harness code is Apache-2.0.
